1.content: So Marge takes Bart, Lisa, and Maggie to the Kwik e mart to buy some food and drinks. So Marge puts Maggie in the cart before walking around the store. So as Marge gets to the back of the store Maggie sees the bathroom and says very cutely, look mommy potty room. So Marge continues to walk towards where the bathroom is. When all of a sudden Maggie screams mommy I got to go potty right now. Does Marge get Maggie to the bathroom in time or does something get in the way?
1.title: Inside the Kwik e mart

12.content: So Marge races to the bathroom door. O sorry Maggie but it looks likes you’re going to have to hold it until I can get the keys to the bathroom door. So Marge turns around and runs to the counter to ask Apu for the key to the bathroom door. When all of a sudden Maggie just couldn’t hold it anymore, and so she made a huge poop in her pull up. Does Apu give Marge the key to the bathroom door immediately or after he gets a whiff of Maggie's poopy pull up?
12.title: Omg it's locked

122.content: Oh! Pee-yew! Mom, I think Maggie fudged her Huggies. Bart, don't say it like that. You'll hurt her feelings. Jeez, Louise. How did you turn cinnamon applesauce into that? Don't try to pin this on me, sister. Does Bart's comment hurt Maggie's feelings?
122.title: Afterwards

1221.content:
When all of a sudden Maggie starts crying saying that when Bart said huggies people will think I’m wearing a diaper not a pull up.
So Marge walks up to the counter with Maggie in a dirty pull up, Bart, and Lisa. Hello, Mrs. Homer. Apu, can I take Maggie into the bathroom. What does Apu say next?
1221.title: Yes

choices: Marge takes care of Maggie Lisa watches bart
Marge watches Bart Lisa takes care of Maggie
12212.content: The bathroom is not for customers. Please use the crack house. Pee-yew! That is the most pungent thing I've ever smelled and I am from lndia, and so Marge comments back saying Apu you wouldn’t be smelling it at all if you let your customers use the stores bathroom. All right, all right, but speak of this to no one. Who watches Bart and who does the dirty deed of changing Maggie's poopy pull up?
12212.title: It's not for customers

choices: Lisa takes Maggie into the bathroom to change her poopy pull up
122122.content: Don't worry. Alright Lisa you stay here with Bart while I take care of Maggie’s dirty pull up, mom please let me take care of her. Um how can I trust that you know how to change her pull up, because I did really good job of taking care of her and changing her when I was babysitting her and Bart.
122122.title: Marge watches Bart Lisa takes care of Maggie

choices: Marge almost got mugged but Maggie kicked the mugger in the nuts
1221221.content: O ok Lisa you go ahead and take care of her while I keep an eye on the family prankster. There's a happy toddler. Aren't you? Aren't you? Lisa can I please just try to go potty in peace before we leave the bathroom, sure you can Maggie in fact I’ll just wait outside if you need me. What happens next?
1221221.title: Lisa takes Maggie into the bathroom to change h...

choices: Amazed by how strong and courageous Maggie was
Disappointed in herself after seeing her toddler defend her from the mugger
12212211.content: Give me your purse. Oh, God, oh, God, oh, God. Shut up. It's not a purse. It's a diaper bag. What? It looks like a purse, that's why I bought it. But it's really a... Shut up! Pee-yew what’s that smell, it’s Maggie’s dirty pull up. O fine you can keep the bag now that it’s full of baby poop. That’s not baby poop that’s toddler poop from our youngest child Maggie. O oops my bad I'll just take this instead. When all of a sudden Maggie comes out of the bathroom and looks up at the mugger with her cute little eyes, and the mugger stops and squats down to give her a hug but that was a mistake. When all of a sudden Bart, Lisa, and Marge see that Maggie is about to kick the mugger in the nuts, but they say nothing as they watch him fall to the ground with his hands over his crotch Come on, Mom, let's go. Mom, are you okay? How does Marge react to the fact that her toddler saved her from getting mugged?
12212211.title: Marge almost got mugged but Maggie kicked the m...

choices: Maggie is not afraid of anything or anyone that might hurt her or family
It was a one time situation
122122112.content:
I guess so kids I just wish I could have done a better job at protecting myself and you three from that mugger instead of letting Maggie do it for me.
So once at home Homer asks the kids what’s wrong with Marge, and they tell Homer that she would have gotten mugged if Maggie didn’t give the mugger her puppy eyes and kick him in the nuts. Wow I didn’t know Maggie could kick that hard. Well neither did I until she kicked my in the eye because I wouldn’t leave her toes a lone. Homer what’s a mother to do if she protect herself and kids from a mugger then how can she protect them from being kidnapped. Um maybe if I join a gym Homer I can get just as strong as Maggie. So that the next I run into that mugger I’ll be the one kicking his ass and not sweet and innocent Maggie over there. What happens next?
122122112.title: Disappointed in herself after seeing her toddle...

info.brief_description: The Simpson kids are aged up by two years
info.description:
Based somewhat off the Simpson's episode strong arms of ma.

It's just another trip to the Kwik e mart for Marge and the kids right nope. In fact things immediately go south. What happens at the Kwik e mart you'll soon find out!
